headline: Nasdaq Concludes Public Consultation on Nasdaq-100 Index® Methodology
summary: NEW YORK, March 30, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Nasdaq (Nasdaq: NDAQ) today announced the resolution of its public consultation on proposed enhancements to the Nasdaq-100 Index® methodology. Following a transparent and open comment period, that opened February 2 and closed February 27, 2026, Nasdaq Global Indexes, has approved updates to the Nasdaq-100 Index methodology, effective May 1, 2026. Nasdaq Global Indexes periodically reviews index methodologies through standard governance processes, and
